name: Disclosure Project Presents New Witness Testimony at the National Press Club
summary: A public Disclosure Project event at the National Press Club featured testimony from Michael Herrera, Eric Hecker, and other witnesses making allegations about concealed UAP programs and advanced technologies. The event materially broadened public attention to both Herrera's Indonesia account and Hecker's South Pole claims; the allegations remain unverified.

relationships.context: Publicly presented his account of an alleged 2009 Indonesia craft encounter
Publicly presented allegations concerning advanced technology at the South Pole
Herrera's central allegation presented during the event
Hecker's central allegation presented during the event
Public disclosure and oversight of alleged concealed programs
